name: dozzze
description: DOZZZE — idle compute enhancer, MVP workspaces root

scripts.build: npm run build -w @dozzze/sdk && npm run build -w @dozzze/client && npm run build -w @dozzze/coordinator && npm run build -w @dozzze/node
scripts.test: npm run build -w @dozzze/sdk && npm run build -w @dozzze/client && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @dozzze/sdk && npm run build -w @dozzze/client && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
